heading_content_part: Privacy PolicySkip to main contentSearch This BlogR Apps StudioPrivacy PolicyR Apps Studio(“Service”, “R Apps Studio ”, "we," "us," or"our") collects information from you in order to provide betterservice and a better user experience.Your privacy is a top priority to us, and this PrivacyPolicy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.This does not cover any collection, use ordisclosure by third parties through any of our applications, products or
services Web sites that we do not control or own and any third party featuresor services made available via an Application.

decoder_heading: What information we use and how we use it
ident_heading: What information we use and how we use it
heading_content_part: What information we use and how we use it:
1.  Read your contactsR Apps Studio does not save or upload yourcontacts. Permission to access contact information is used when you searchcontacts in R Apps Studiosearchbar.
2.  Take pictures and videosThis permission allows R Apps Studioto use your device’s camera to take photos/ videos and turn ON/OFF Camera Flash. We do not save or upload yourphotos/videos.

3.  Approximate location (network-based)This permission allows R Apps Studioto identify and display your location onmap or apps installed by anonymous surrounding users and to recommend popularapps based on users’ location. This information is untraceable.

4.  Read phone status and identityThis permission allows R Apps Studioto recognize an incoming/outgoing call andto switch between the User System interface and call interface orannounces/shows the caller name while some one is calling, you will identify itwithout looking to your smart phone.

decoder_heading: 5. Read your text messages (SMS or MMS)
ident_heading: 5.  Read your text messages (SMS or MMS
heading_content_part: 5.  Read your text messages (SMS or MMS)We do not save or upload your messages. We usethis permission to read your text messages when you search messages in searchbar or announce the sender name while some one is send you a message, you willidentify it without looking to your smart phone.

decoder_heading: 6. Modify or delete the contents of your USB storage
ident_heading:
6.  Modify or delete the contents of your
USB storag
heading_content_part: 6.  Modify or delete the contents of yourUSB storageThis permission allows R Apps Studioto delete app data (image, text, audio etc..)stored on their SD card.

7.  Find accounts on the devicesR Apps Studiodoes not recognize or save your account information for any programs. RApps Studioonly detects whetherusers have a Google account linked with the device which helps us confirm thestate of Google Service and provide users with appropriate application downloadand update methods.

decoder_heading: 8. Read calendar events plus confidential information
ident_heading:
8.  Read calendar events plus confidential
informatio
heading_content_part: 8.  Read calendar events plus confidentialinformationThis information is used only in the R AppsStudioto remind you of your latestcalendar events. We do not save or upload any of your calendar information.

decoder_heading: 9. Read the contents of your USB storage
ident_heading: 9.  Read the contents of your USB storag
heading_content_part: 9.  Read the contents of your USB storageThis permission allows R Apps Studioto view app data (image, text, audio etc..)stored on their SD card.
10.  Read Google service configurationThis information is used to acquire advertisingID. R Apps Studioprovide users withbetter advertising service by using such anonymous ID.
11.  Change network connectivityThis permission is used in R Apps Studiosettings and notification toolbar, in orderto change/check network connectivity.
12.  Connect and disconnect from Wi-FiThis permission is used in R Apps Studiosettings and notification toolbar in order toconnect and disconnect from Wi-Fi.
13.  Set an alarmThis permission allows users to access thedevice's alarm through R Apps Studioclock widget.
14.  Full network accessThis permission is used to access the device’snetwork for certain functions including receiving update notifications oraccessing app classification labels.
15.  View network connectionsThis permission is used in R Apps Studiosettings and notification toolbar, in orderto view network connections.
16.  View Wi-Fi connectionsThis permission is used in R Apps Studiosettings and notification toolbar, in orderto view Wi-Fi connections.
17.  Access Bluetooth settingsThis permission is used in R Apps Studiosettings, in order to turn on and off theBluetooth.
18.  Pair with Bluetooth devicesThis permission is used in R AppsStudiosettings, in order to pair withBluetooth devices.
19.  Close other appsThis permission is used in R Apps StudioBoost in order to turn off the back-end appsand make the phone run faster.
20.  Retrieve running appsThis permission is used in R Apps StudioBoost in order to view the running apps.
21.  Run as startupR Apps Studiowill run as startup to provide users with a launcher service.
22.  Control vibrationThis permission allows R Apps Studioto make the phone vibrate once after usersset the device on vibrate, confirming the setting has been turned on.
23.  Adjust your wallpaper sizeThis permission allows users to crop R AppsStudiowallpaper to the desired size.
24.  Set wallpaperThis permission allows users to set a selected RApps Studioimage as their wallpaper.

25.  Photos/Media/FilesModify or delete the contents of your USB storageTest access to protected storage When user recommends friends to download RApps Studioby sharing to socialnetwork, we need to save an introduction picture to be shared on SD card. Wewon’t access other file on SD card.
26.  Device & app historyRetrieve running appsWe use this information to boost your Androidphone effectively, clean your device's RAM and make your phone speed up indepth.
27.  Measure app storage spaceThis permission is used to acquire the amount ofstorage space used by an application.
28.  Modify system settingsThis permission is used in R Apps Studiosettings, in order to switch or adjustringtone, vibration and brightness level of the screen.
29.  Read Home settings and shortcutsThis permission is used to acquire the user’sHome settings and shortcuts, in order to maintain user preferences.
30.  Uninstall shortcutsThis permission allows R Apps Studioto delete the shortcuts created by R AppsStudioin other Android launchers.
31.  Draw over other appsThis permission allows the R Apps StudioFree Swipe tab to be displayed as a floatingwindow on other apps.
32.  Read sync settingsThis permission is used in R Apps Studiopower’s save mode, and allows R AppsStudioto recognize whether syncsettings are turned on or off.
33.  Toggle sync on and offThis permission is used in R Apps Studiopower’s save mode, and allows R AppsStudioto synchronize with the user'ssync settings.
34.  Expand/collapse status barThis permission is used for the gesture featureof R Apps StudioUser System to expandand collapse the status bar.
35.  Install shortcutsThis permission is used to install shortcuts onother launchers, so users can continue to useR Apps Studiorelated functions.

How we protect your informationWe have implemented commercially reasonabletechnical and organizational measures to protect your personal information fromaccidental loss and from loss, misuse and unauthorized access, disclosure,alteration and destruction. However, please note that although we takereasonable measures to protect your information, no app, website, Internettransmission, computer system or wireless connection is completely secure.

Sensitive InformationWe ask that you not send us and also not discloseany sensitive Personal Information (e.g., information related to politicalopinions, racial or ethnic origin, religion or other beliefs, health etc) on orthrough application, the Services or the Site or otherwise to us. Keep safeyour personal and sensitive information and strictly we do not ask to submit.

How we share your informationWe may retain third parties to perform serviceson our behalf and we may collaborate with third parties with respect toparticular products or services. These third parties may be provided withaccess to the information needed to perform their functions, as long as theyagree to keep the information confidential. We reserve the right to discloseyour information as required by law, when we believe disclosure is necessary to
comply with a regulatory requirement, judicial proceeding, court order, orlegal process served on us, or to protect the safety, rights, or property ofour users, the public or R Apps Studio .
Children's PrivacyWe are committed to protecting the privacy ofchildren. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children underthe age of 13.

Changes to the Privacy PolicyR Apps Studiomay, in its sole discretion, change this Privacy Policy from time totime, any and all changes will be reflected here and the date new versions areposted will be stated at the top of this Privacy Policy, so please review itperiodically.
